author: CasaOS Team
description:
**Elevate Your Home Media Experience**. qBittorrent transforms your home media setup with a polished interface reminiscent of µTorrent, minus the ads. Unlike traditional download tools, it offers a streamlined, efficient, and ad-free experience. This makes it a perfect fit for those seeking a hassle-free way to manage and enjoy their media collections at home.

**Feature-Rich and User-Friendly**. With qBittorrent, you gain access to a well-integrated and extensible search engine, allowing simultaneous searches across multiple torrent sites, and category-specific searches for books, music, and software. Its support for RSS feeds with advanced filters, magnet links, encrypted connections, and more, ensures you have complete control over your downloads. Available on all major platforms and in around 70 languages, qBittorrent is both versatile and accessible.

**Seamless Integration with Private Clouds like Zima**. Deploying qBittorrent on private cloud devices such as Zima offers unparalleled convenience. Enjoy virtually unlimited storage, enhanced privacy for your data, and local network speeds that make downloading and streaming effortless. This setup ensures that your media library is always at your fingertips, securely and swiftly.

tips.before_install:
Default Account

| Username | Password |
|----------|----------|
| `admin`    | Get from log |

Passwords need to be viewed in the log

Default Accessible Path in qBittorrent

| Name | Value |
| ---- | ----- |
| DATA Path | `/DATA` |
| Downloads Path | `/DATA/Downloads` |
| Media Path | `/DATA/Media` |

The paths of other DATA subdirectories in CasaOS are also similar.
Please make sure you use the correct path when using qBittorrent.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- release-5.0.4 fixes removing trackers via WebAPI and torrent content checkbox state handling.
- Peer-list zero/infinity values are hidden only when that setting is Always.
- Fixes include stopped torrents in the error tracker filter, WebUI context-menu memory leaks, WebAPI string trimming, Windows Qt style handling, and a macOS memory leak.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- release-5.0.4 fixes removing trackers via WebAPI and torrent content checkbox state handling.
- Peer-list zero/infinity values are hidden only when that setting is Always.
- Fixes include stopped torrents in the error tracker filter, WebUI context-menu memory leaks, WebAPI string trimming, Windows Qt style handling, and a macOS memory leak.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- release-5.0.4 risolve il problema relativo alla rimozione dei tracker tramite WebAPI e alla gestione dello stato delle caselle di controllo dei contenuti torrent.
- I valori Peer-list zero/infinito vengono nascosti solo quando l'impostazione è Sempre.
- Le correzioni includono torrent interrotti nel filtro di rilevamento errori, perdite di memoria WebUI context-menu, taglio delle stringhe WebAPI, gestione dello stile Qt di Windows e perdita di memoria di macOS.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- release-5.0.4 fikser fjerning av sporere via WebAPI og tilstandshåndtering for torrentinnhold.
- Peer-list null/uendelig verdier er skjult bare når den innstillingen er Alltid.
- Rettelser inkluderer stoppede torrenter i feilsporingsfilteret, WebUI context-menu minnelekkasjer, WebAPI strengtrimming, Windows Qt-stilhåndtering og en macOS-minnelekkasje.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- release-5.0.4 修复了通过 WebAPI 删除 trackers，以及 torrent content checkbox state 处理。
- peer list 中的 zero/infinity 值只会在该设置为 Always 时隐藏。
- 修复还包括 error tracker filter 中的 stopped torrents、WebUI context-menu 内存泄漏、WebAPI 字符串 trim、Windows Qt style 处理，以及一个 macOS 内存泄漏。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- release-5.0.4 は WebAPI 経由の trackers 削除と torrent content checkbox state の処理を修正します。
- peer list の zero/infinity 値は、設定が Always の場合のみ非表示になります。
- 修正には error tracker filter 内の stopped torrents、WebUI context-menu のメモリリーク、WebAPI 文字列 trim、Windows Qt style 処理、macOS メモリリークが含まれます。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- release-5.0.4는 WebAPI를 통한 trackers 제거와 torrent content checkbox state 처리를 수정합니다.
- peer list의 zero/infinity 값은 해당 설정이 Always일 때만 숨겨집니다.
- 수정 사항에는 error tracker filter의 stopped torrents, WebUI context-menu 메모리 누수, WebAPI 문자열 trim, Windows Qt style 처리, macOS 메모리 누수가 포함됩니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- release-5.0.4 corrige la suppression de trackers via WebAPI et la gestion du torrent content checkbox state.
- Les valeurs zero/infinity de la liste des pairs ne sont masquées que lorsque ce réglage est sur Always.
- Les correctifs incluent les stopped torrents dans le error tracker filter, des fuites mémoire du WebUI context-menu, le trim des chaînes WebAPI, la gestion du style Qt Windows et une fuite mémoire macOS.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- release-5.0.4 behebt das Entfernen von Trackern über WebAPI und die Behandlung des torrent content checkbox state.
- Zero-/Infinity-Werte in der Peer-Liste werden nur ausgeblendet, wenn diese Einstellung auf Always steht.
- Weitere Korrekturen betreffen stopped torrents im error tracker filter, Speicherlecks im WebUI context-menu, WebAPI-String-Trimming, Windows-Qt-Style-Verarbeitung und ein macOS-Speicherleck.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- release-5.0.4 fixar borttagning av spårare via WebAPI och hantering av tillståndskontroll för torrentinnehåll.
- Peer-list noll/oändlighetsvärden är dolda endast när den inställningen är Alltid.
- Fixningar inkluderar stoppade torrents i felspårningsfiltret, WebUI context-menu minnesläckor, WebAPI strängtrimning, Windows Qt-stilhantering och en macOS-minnesläcka.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το release-5.0.4 διορθώνει την κατάργηση των ιχνηλατών μέσω WebAPI και χειρισμού κατάστασης του πλαισίου ελέγχου περιεχομένου torrent.
- Οι τιμές Peer-list μηδέν/άπειρο κρύβονται μόνο όταν αυτή η ρύθμιση είναι Πάντα.
- Οι διορθώσεις περιλαμβάνουν διακοπή torrent στο φίλτρο παρακολούθησης σφαλμάτων, διαρροές μνήμης WebUI context-menu, περικοπή συμβολοσειρών WebAPI, διαχείριση στυλ Windows Qt και διαρροή μνήμης macOS.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- release-5.0.4 popravlja uklanjanje trackera putem WebAPI i rukovanje statusom potvrdnog okvira sadržaja torrenta.
- Peer-list nula/beskonačne vrijednosti skrivene su samo kada je ta postavka Uvijek.
- Popravci uključuju zaustavljene torrente u filtru za praćenje pogrešaka, curenje memorije WebUI context-menu, skraćivanje niza WebAPI, rukovanje stilom Windows Qt i curenje memorije macOS-a.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- release-5.0.4 corrige a remoção de rastreadores através de WebAPI e tratamento de estado da caixa de seleção de conteúdo torrent.
- Peer-list os valores zero/infinito estão ocultos apenas quando esta definição é Sempre.
- As correções incluem torrents interrompidos no filtro do rastreador de erros, fugas de memória WebUI context-menu, corte de string WebAPI, manipulação ao estilo Windows Qt e fuga de memória do macOS.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- release-5.0.4 исправляет удаление трекеров через WebAPI и обработку состояния флажка торрент-контента.
- Значения нуля/бесконечности Peer-list скрыты только в том случае, если для этого параметра установлено значение «Всегда».
- Исправления включают остановку торрентов в фильтре отслеживания ошибок, утечки памяти WebUI context-menu, обрезку строк WebAPI, обработку в стиле Windows Qt и утечку памяти macOS.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- release-5.0.4, izleyicileri WebAPI aracılığıyla kaldırmayı ve torrent içeriği onay kutusu durum işlemeyi düzeltir.
- Peer-list sıfır/sonsuz değerleri yalnızca bu ayar Her Zaman olduğunda gizlenir.
- Düzeltmeler arasında hata izleyici filtresinde durdurulan torrentler, WebUI context-menu bellek sızıntıları, WebAPI dize kırpma, Windows Qt tarzı işleme ve macOS bellek sızıntısı yer alıyor.

title: qBittorrent
